use_cases: Animated clock background for landing pages and hero sections
Decorative time visualization for dashboard or app backgrounds
Artistic clock display for media websites and portfolios
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered shader clock that renders a full-window animated time display with spectral color mapping based on wavelength-to-RGB calculations. Uses vertex and fragment shaders to compute colors in real-time, creating a vibrant rainbow effect that continuously animates with the current time.
